name: Sky Lending (MakerDAO/Sky)
special_mechanism_summary: Multi-collateral CDP with Peg Stability Module (PSM) allowing 1:1 swap between USDS and approved stablecoins, a Direct Deposit Module (D3M) that autonomously mints/burns USDS into external lending protocols to control on-chain borrowing rates, and a Savings Rate (SSR/DSR) applied to deposited USDS.
notes: C3' combination potential: D3M makes Sky a direct rate-setter in Aave money markets — D3M target rate adjustments change USDS supply instantly; PSM is a zero-slippage swap path between USDS and USDC/USDT exploitable whenever DEX pricing diverges from PSM rate; governance-controlled stability fee changes affect all open CDPs simultaneously and can be anticipated from visible governance proposals.
